title: Marathon Digital Holdings (MARA) Q2 Earnings Preview: Here's What to Expect
text: Marathon Digital Holdings released Q2 financials on August 1, 2024. Prior to earnings, analysts expected MARA to report a loss of 0.01 per share, the same as the figure in the prior year quarter. Analysts expected revenues of $157.9 million, reflecting a solid 93% year-over-year increase. Actual Q2 2024 Results: Revenue at $145.1 million was up 78% year-over-year but fell short of estimates of $157.84 million. The company reported a net loss of $199.7 million, or $0.72 loss per diluted share, compared to a net loss of $9.0 million or $0.07 loss per diluted share in Q2 2023. The net loss was heavily impacted by a $148.0 million fair market value loss on digital assets. Bitcoin Production: Marathon Digital Holdings produced 2,058 bitcoins, a 30% decrease from Q2 2023.
